name: Marble Spritz
recipeInstructions: Prepare Butter Spritz and Chocolate Spritz dough according to the respective recipes. Do not chill the dough. Pack the doughs side by side into a cookie press. Force the dough through the press onto an ungreased cookie sheet. Bake in a 375°F oven for 8 to 10 minutes or until the edges of the cookies are firm but not brown. Remove the cookies and cool on wire racks. Makes about 84. Source: BH&G Christmas Cookies 1995.
